provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Declaration of National Monuments Order.

provisions.title: Declaration of national monuments
provisions.content:
2. Declaration of national monuments
The monuments, relics and recent artifacts listed in the Schedule hereto, are hereby declared as national monuments.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Monuments and Relics Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Honorary officers
Custodians

definitions.definition: various activities done in order to achieve an objective of how to execute the management of collected materials
the Department of National Museum and Monuments
a person who seeks to undertake an infrastructural project

a localised area that contains a relic or relics of a fossilised nature where fossil remains have over many years taken a crystal, rock-like formation warranting its recognition as being of heritage value
a specific activity done to achieve a particular plan
a particular plan in place to manage or carry out a particular mission
a recreational and vigil that take place between the hours of 6pm and 6am on any day of the week
a past climate of a specific place during a specific era
a person who carries out research on a national monument, monument, site, recent artefact or relic.
